title: Ravenhead Essentials Swirl Tumbler Glasses Set of 8 - Tall Hiball Glasses 280 ml and Mixer Glasses 300 ml Glassware Set for Water Beverages Beer Cocktails
features: SET OF 8 SWIRL TUMBLER SET | These tumblers are versatile, perfect for serving a variety of beverages, such as water, iced tea, juice or cocktails.
SET CONTAINS | This set contains 4x swirl super hiball 48cl glasses & 4x swirl mixer 30cl glasses.
SWIRL PATTERN | The 8 piece tumbler set features a swirl pattern, adding a decorative,touch to the glassware and can enhance the visual appeal of your table setting.

RAVENHEAD | Ravenhead dates back to a factory based at St Helens in North West England in 1842, an area renowned for its glassmaking, Primarily producing bottles, Ravenhead in the 1930s branched out into domestic tableware such as bowls, jugs and drinking glasses.

PERFECT GIFT | These glasses are a perfect gift for anyone, including dads, husbands, brothers, boyfriends, friends, and women. Ideal for Mother's Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year, anniversaries, Father's Day, birthdays, engagements, weddings, and Valentine's Day.
description: From the manufacturer ESSENTIALS SWIRL Boasting a mesmerizing swirl design on the outside, these glasses add a touch of sophistication and style to any occasion. With a generous capacity, the are perfect for serving up favourite beverages, whether it’s a refreshing lemonade or a classic cocktail.
